Language
of the Market.
content.heroSub: Advanced Technical Analysis · 20 Years of Real Market Experience
content.heroDesc: At Market Credo, we don’t teach signals or tips. We teach the core concepts of technical analysis — chart structure, chart flow, the logic and beauty of price action — so deeply that you build your own strategy and trade with complete independence.
content.heroQuote: Chart aapse baat karte hein, aapko language samajhni chahiye.
content.heroQuoteTrans: Charts speak to you — you just need to learn their language.
content.ticker: NEW BATCH STARTING SOON · BOOK FREE DEMO · CALL +91-8827979008
mentorBio: Atish Shakergaye is a SEBI Registered Research Analyst based in Bhopal, India, with over 20 years of deep market experience. He is the founder of Market Credo — a professional stock market training institute dedicated to building genuine trading and investing skills.

With a strong belief in the power of Technical Analysis and Price Action, Atish sir has trained hundreds of students across India — both online and offline — helping them develop the discipline and clarity needed to navigate complex markets.

His approach is simple: teach the core concepts so deeply that every student can read charts, understand market structure, and build their own strategy — without depending on tips, signals, or anyone else.

whyCards.title: SEBI Registered Analyst
whyCards.desc: Government-recognized Research Analyst. Your education is backed by regulatory credibility and 20+ years of real market experience.

whyCards.title: No Tips — Pure Education
whyCards.desc: We teach you to fish, not hand you a fish. Every concept is taught from first principles so you become a self-sufficient trader.

whyCards.title: Core Concepts Only
whyCards.desc: Price action, chart structure, chart flow — the real language of the market. No indicators, no shortcuts, just deep understanding.

whyCards.title: Personal Mentorship
whyCards.desc: Direct access to Atish sir. Small batches, personalised attention, real market discussions.

courses.title: Technical Analysis Foundation
courses.desc: A beginner-friendly course designed to build a rock-solid base in chart reading, market structure, and the core principles of Technical Analysis.

courses.title: Price Action Mastery
courses.desc: Go beyond the basics. This course covers advanced candlestick analysis, multi-timeframe thinking, and real-world trade setups with Price Action.

courses.title: Advanced Chart Analysis
courses.desc: An intensive program for serious market students. Advanced pattern recognition, multi-timeframe analysis, trading psychology, and live market sessions with Atish sir.

settings.address: Plot No 83, Shrinivas Tower, M.P. Nagar Zone II, Bhopal, MP 462016

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.quote: Market Credo changed the way I look at charts. Atish sir teaches with incredible clarity — no jargon, no confusion. Within 3 months I could read market structure on my own. Highly recommended for anyone serious about trading.

testimonials.name: Amit Sharma
testimonials.quote: Maine bahut jagah se seekha, lekin yahan ka approach bilkul alag hai. Concept-based teaching — koi tips nahi, sirf market ki language. Ab main khud analyse kar sakta hoon. Shukriya Atish sir.

testimonials.name: Priya Desai
testimonials.quote: The personal mentorship is what sets Market Credo apart. You’re not just watching videos — Atish sir actually reviews your charts, corrects your thinking, and builds your confidence step by step. Worth every rupee.

testimonials.name: Suresh Kumar
testimonials.quote: I was completely lost in the noise of social media tips before joining Market Credo. After the Foundation course, I finally understood that charts tell the truth — you just have to learn to listen. Atish sir is a true educator.

testimonials.name: Neha Joshi
testimonials.quote: As someone with zero market background, I was nervous. But Atish sir’s Foundation course is designed for people like me. Step by step, concept by concept. Now I confidently analyze Nifty charts every morning before work.
